[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000101 4
1 10111011 6
2 11111110 7
3 00110101 4
4 01110101 5
5 11001111 6
6 10111111 7
7 10111011 6

01 10 11111110 7 match 2
12 21 01100101 4

56 65 00000001 1
67 76 01000101 3
70 07 00000100 1

72 27 10011111 6
